name: Duration of Utah Workers' Comp Benefits

mainEntity.name: How long do Utah workers' comp benefits last after injury?
mainEntity.text: How long do Utah workers' comp benefits last after injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Temporary benefits up to 312 weeks; permanent based on impairment; medical lifetime if related.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah Code §34A-2-413: TTD/TPD 312 weeks aggregate. PPI one-time. Lifetime medical for open claims. Insurers close files prematurely; monitor MMI.

description: Temporary benefits up to 312 weeks; permanent based on impairment; medical lifetime if related.
